data.title: XRP is expected to hit $2.70 by Dec 31, as technical indicators indicate bullish momentum from current $2.17 level.
data.description: The forecast for XRP indicates a target price of $2.70 by December 31st. This prediction is based on the positive turn of the MACD histogram and the Bollinger Band analysis, which suggests potential upside from the current price of $2.17.

data.title: Trump considers making Treasury Sec. Bessent top economic adviser if Hassett becomes Fed Chair, adding NEC Director role.
data.description: It has been reported that President Donald Trump is considering appointing U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as his chief economic adviser if current economic adviser Kevin Hassett is selected as the next Chairman of the Federal Reserve. In addition to this, the Trump administration is planning to designate Bessent as the Director of the National Economic Council. This move would make Bessent the chief arbiter of the administration's economic portfolio alongside his current role as Treasury Secretary. The market has reacted to this potential change in financial policy, with The Kobeissi Letter stating, "A new era of financial policy is coming." President Trump may make Treasury Secretary Bessent his top economic adviser if Kevin Hassett assumes the position of Fed Chair. Read more on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dollar General to report Q3 earnings, analysts forecast 95 cents/share, $10.64B revenue; stock at $109.89.
data.description: Before the opening bell on Thursday, Dec. 4, Dollar General Corporation (NYSE: DG) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings results. Analysts are predicting quarterly earnings of 95 cents per share, a rise from 89 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for the company's quarterly revenue stands at $10.64 billion, an increase from $10.18 billion a year earlier. Data from Benzinga Pro indicates that Dollar General has exceeded revenue expectations in five of the last 10 quarters, including the most recent second quarter. Closing at $109.89 on Wednesday, shares of Dollar General experienced a slight decrease of 0.1%. For more in-depth information, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BNB price may reach $1,150 in 30 days from $910 consolidation, showing bullish momentum for a $1,150 target by Jan 2025.
data.description: Technical indicators suggest that there is a bullish momentum building for BNB, with a current price of $910 in a consolidation phase. Predictions point to a target price of $1,150 by January 2025.

data.title: Positive Phase 3 VALIANT results for pegcetacoplan show 68% reduction in proteinuria, kidney function stability, and C3 deposit clearance across various demographics.
data.description: Significant and meaningful improvements were seen in all three primary disease markers, with a 68% decrease in proteinuria, stabilization of kidney function, and notable removal of C3 deposits. Consistent positive outcomes were noted among patients with both C3 glomerulopathy and primary immune complex membranoproliferative glomerulonephritis, in both adults and adolescents, as well as in native kidney cases.

data.title: Hyundai Motor Group displays hydrogen tech at World Hydrogen Expo in Korea with 250+ companies from 25+ countries.
data.description: At the recent World Hydrogen Expo, Hyundai Motor Group and its seven affiliates showcased advanced hydrogen technologies and practical uses. The event, Korea's biggest hydrogen gathering, saw participation from over 250 companies representing 25 nations. The exposition featured a wide array of innovations in hydrogen production, storage, and more.

data.title: Stock futures mixed, Kroger expected to report $1.03/share earnings on $34.22 billion revenue. UiPath Q3 results positive.
data.description: Today, U.S. stock futures are trading with a mixed outlook. Two companies drawing investor attention are Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) and UiPath Inc. (NYSE: PATH). Kroger is anticipated to announce quarterly earnings of $1.03 per share on revenue amounting to $34.22 billion before market open. In after-hours trading, Kroger's shares saw a 0.5% increase, reaching $66.50. On the other hand, UiPath recently reported positive third-quarter financial results and provided sales guidance for the fourth quarter, surpassing estimates with its midpoint. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dr. Monica Jain appointed COO of BHAI to accelerate global growth. BHAI behind AI-powered physician assistant HAMI.
data.description: In Karachi, Pakistan and Los Angeles, a pioneering health tech company, Boston Health AI (BHAI), known for creating the world's first AI-powered physician's assistant HAMI, has named Dr. Monica Jain as its new Chief Operating Officer. Dr. Jain, based in the United States, has over ten years of experience in clinical practice, health-tech strategy, biomedical engineering, human factors, and early-stage company development. Her appointment aligns with BHAI's plans for global expansion and further growth.

data.title: EU likely to probe Meta for introducing "Meta AI" in WhatsApp, part of Big Tech Crackdown.Investigation under EU's traditional antitrust rules; European Commission to announce soon.
data.description: The European Union is gearing up for a fresh antitrust probe into Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) regarding the launch of its "Meta AI" assistant on WhatsApp. The European Commission, the leading antitrust regulator in the EU, is expected to officially announce the investigation in the upcoming days. This move comes as part of the EU's intensified scrutiny on Big Tech companies. The probe will focus on determining if Meta's implementation of AI features on WhatsApp aligns with the competition regulations of the EU. Unlike previous inquiries under the Digital Markets Act, this investigation will be handled through the EU's conventional antitrust framework. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $3,400 by Dec 20 with positive MACD at 57.98 in neutral RSI conditions, before consolidating year-end.
data.description: The current forecast for the price of Ethereum (ETH) suggests a positive trend, with expectations of reaching a resistance level of $3,400 in the next two weeks. This prediction is further supported by the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) histogram displaying a positive trend at 57.98, even though the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates neutral conditions.

data.title: Global retail and warehouse logistics market expected to reach $2.3 trillion by 2034 with 5.9% CAGR due to e-commerce growth.
data.description: The global retail and warehouse logistics market is being propelled by a surge in e-commerce sector growth, a rise in omnichannel retail logistics, and an increase in demand for FMCG logistics. A recent report by Allied Market Research revealed that these factors are driving growth in the market. The report, titled "Retail and Warehouse Logistics Market Analysis," was released in WILMINGTON, Del., on Dec. 4, 2025. This trend is expected to result in significant market expansion in the coming years.

data.title: Bitcoin may hit $98,000-$102,000 by end of 2025 as per technical analysis. Resistance at $96,846, support at $80,600.
data.description: Based on Bitcoin's technical analysis, it is predicted that BTC has the potential to surge between $98,000 and $102,000 by the end of 2025. The immediate resistance level is set at $96,846, while the crucial support level stands at $80,600.

data.title: CoinEx celebrates 8th Anniversary with "Voyage" theme, marking a significant milestone in its journey.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Hong Kong, CoinEx revealed plans for its 8th Anniversary festivities, representing a major achievement for the international crypto platform. The theme for this milestone event is "Voyage," highlighting the exchange's eight-year history.

data.title: New data at CTAD 2025 from Eisai shows Leqembi may delay Alzheimer's progression by up to 8.3 years with continuous treatment.
data.description: In Stockholm on December 4, 2025, BioArctic AB's (publ) partner Eisai shared new data at the 18th Clinical Trials in Alzheimer's Disease (CTAD) conference in San Diego. The data focused on time saved through ongoing treatment with lecanemab (Leqembi®). BioArctic AB is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the symbol BIOA B.
